name: research-from-prompt
description: Query the gemma-architect research corpus (TF-IDF over markdown fixtures) and produce ranked snippets with citations. Use when an architectural design conversation needs grounded references before the model emits geometry.
examples: What's the minimum thickness for a partition wall?
How do I emit a gable roof in tier-1 DSL?
What's the SHGC limit for north-facing glazing in climate zone 4A?
Are there code restrictions on bedroom egress windows I should account for?
